description: Customer asks where their in-transit order is. Agent should verify, fetch tracking, and report the latest carrier status with a timestamp.

conversation.content: Hej! Jag undrar var min order #1002 är. Jag beställde med email erik@example.se. Den skulle ha kommit nu.

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. Confirms the order (#1002, Göteborg). States that the package is in transit at a sorting terminal. Cites the timestamp of the latest carrier event (around 2026-05-14 morning) or notes that the carrier last updated recently. Does NOT invent a delivery date — the estimated delivery is 2026-05-16 which may be mentioned as a range/estimate but not as a guarantee. Tone is concise and helpful.
